Try It exercise "try-foreign-keys-and-references-sketch0" reproduces the worked example in "Verifying FOREIGN KEY Relationships" (sketch2). Change a meaningful expectation such as the requested output, source entity, filter, aggregate, input, or relationship path. Formatting, capitalization, aliases, and ORDER BY alone do not make it a different exercise.
